first_run.rationale: The score remains identical, and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions praise the candidate's extensive experience but identify the same fundamental gap: a lack of specific, high-level AI strategy experience relevant to the role. The differences in the phrasing of the strengths and concerns are minor, represent different facets of the same core critique, and fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in dates, implying an older candidate, negatively impacted the evaluation.
